summary: Set 101 Session 2 of 2 (the final session, closing the module-lifecycle-simplification bundle Sets 098-101 at its single release boundary): docs, guidance, changelogs, and the release gate. Rewrote the onboarding/teaching surface to the shipped flow (Build scaffolds a real `default` module + `001-default-plan`/`002-default-decomposition`, which flips the Work Explorer from the Getting Started form to the tree; the Set 093 `Plan`/`Session sets` child nodes and the `AI Plan`/`Import Plan`/`AI Sets` strip actions retired in Set 100, palette flows surviving): the three-person `module-team-hello-world.md` tutorial (Part 2 Build now scaffolds default+2 sets and flips to the tree; Part 3 deletes the Class1 Default starter then declares the 3 real modules via the surviving decomposition prompt; Part 5 tree description flattened to module->buckets->rows with the Open Plan/Add/Rename/Delete strip; AI Plan/AI Sets self-serve replaced by the palette Import Project Plan / Generate Session-Set Prompt commands), `quick-start.md`, the extension README, and the scaffolded `getting-started.md.template` Sections 2-3 (the 'form is still up' premise was made false by S1's default scaffold - a live shipping contradiction the sweep fixed). Authored the new `docs/module-reorganization.md` guide (routed documentation draft, gemini-pro; refined for accurate links + shipped-fact fidelity): rename/delete/add UI ops (Set 099/100 semantics), the ask-the-AI split/merge path, and the optional never-forced legacy-repo migration recipe (declare -> Assign legacy sets to module -> adopt lifecycle), linked from the tutorial/quick-start/getting-started/README and the scaffolded `docs/modules.yaml` header comment. Extension CHANGELOG gained the 0.44.0 entry for the 098-101 bundle (Added/Changed/Removed) and package.json bumped 0.43.0->0.44.0; router untouched at 0.33.0 (zero ai_router/ changes accrued across 098-101, so no ai_router/CHANGELOG entry). Only non-doc code change: a comment-only pointer line in `MODULES_YAML_HEADER_COMMENTS` (moduleAuthoring.ts) + one in-place test copy-pin update in sessionGenPrompt.test.ts (the onboarding doc now teaches the module-first plan path docs/modules/default/project-plan.md). VERIFICATION (phased, verifier gpt-5-6, anthropic excluded, 3 rounds, ~$0.58): discovery R1 (K=2) ISSUES_FOUND 4 Major - two real (the modules.yaml header pointed consumer repos at a repo-only doc path; the reorg migration recipe assumed lifecycle sets exist after the AI-prompt/by-hand declaration paths that never scaffold them) plus a duplicated screenshot completeness claim; supplementary R2 found 1 real Major (the primary sequence offered delete Default after the decomposition set had created real work sets stamped module:default, which delete would cancel). Remediation R1 fixed all three real findings (pointer -> full GitHub URL; migration recipe reworked to the two-path lifecycle-sets-vs-direct-authoring model; rename-vs-delete nuance propagated across the reorg doc, getting-started template, quick-start, README, and the tutorial), and DISPUTED the screenshot finding as a false positive with concrete evidence (the tutorial and getting-started template embed zero screenshots; the README's getting-started.png is the unchanged two-section form; work-explorer-modules.png already shows the Set-100 flattened tree - module -> status buckets -> rows with no retired child nodes). Remediation-review R3: VERIFIED, 0 blocking, fix verdicts 2 accepted + 2 accepted-with-modification + 0 rejected (screenshot dispute accepted as settled), 2 Minor nits on module-reorganization.md folded in post-VERIFIED (lifecycle-sets-vs-direct-authoring made an explicit two-path choice; multi-module rename+add now points to the split path for redistributing sets). Suites green at close: extension unit 1618/1618 (one test copy-pin updated in place, 0 net-new); tsc --noEmit clean; eslint 7 pre-existing errors in untouched files (baseline unchanged, moduleAuthoring.ts clean); esbuild clean (dist + bundled templates synced); cold-start goldens regenerated both tiers (byte-match); Playwright Layer 3 28/28 (L-064-12); Python cold-start acceptance 2/2 (no ai_router/ file touched -> pytest 3030/6 baseline unchanged). Deliberate scope extension recorded: the getting-started.md.template Sections 2-3 + README + the modules.yaml header (consumer-shipping docs beyond the spec's literal Touches list) were swept because they carried the same retired-UI + form-is-up contradiction Step 4 targets; leaving them would ship a self-contradiction. Screenshots (spec 'retake affected screenshots'): satisfied by inspection - no shipping screenshot depicts changed UI; the module-tree PNG already shows the flattened structure. RELEASE BOUNDARY REACHED: extension 0.44.0 is publish-ready; Marketplace/Open VSX publish (tag vsix-v0.44.0) is operator-gated. package-lock.json top-level version deliberately left stale at 0.41.0 (matches the 0.42/0.43 precedent; regenerated at package time).
